name: Underground Datacenter
text1: An undeclared datacenter was discovered operating outside treaty oversight. It had no access to frontier algorithms.
text2: An undeclared datacenter obtained leaked training methods and trained a dangerous model before it was discovered.
image-prompt: A massive underground cavern filled with rows of server racks, cables snaking along rock walls, industrial cooling fans, dim blue LED lighting, oppressive atmosphere, digital painting, no text
